use_cases: Handling image file uploads with automatic client-side preview generation using blob URLs
Managing file upload state including preview URL and filename for display in UI
Cleaning up blob URLs and resetting file input when images are removed
Providing reusable image upload logic for any React component
ai_summary: A React hook that encapsulates image upload functionality including client-side preview generation via URL.createObjectURL, file selection handling, and automatic cleanup of blob URLs on unmount or removal. Returns refs and handlers for seamless integration into any upload UI component.
